arts.ttl: Arsenal set to sign £51m Martin Zubimendi from Real Sociedad, with deal virtually completed to beat Liverpool and Man City for summer transfer - and Mikel Arteta wants a forward next
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: The Real Sociedad star has been courted by Mikel Arteta for over 12 months and talks over a summer move are now at an advanced stage with sources indicating the deal is virtually completed.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Man City ex-manager and club legend Tony Book dies aged 90 as tributes pour in
arts.sum: Manchester City have announced that Tony Book, their former player and manager who captained the side back in the 1970s, has died at the age of 90 in a club statement

arts.ttl: Tony Book dead at 90: Man City lead tributes to title and FA Cup winning captain and club legend
arts.sum: Manchester City have announced the death of their former club captain Tony Book at the age of 90.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's wife Cristina was ‘drawn to the lure’ of other Premier League jobs
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola and his wife Cristina Serra have reportedly split after 30 years together, with the mother of his three children said to have been based in a different country for several years

arts.ttl: Man City kickstart rebuild as club agree £30m deal to sign Vitor Reis
arts.sum: Premier League champions also working on move to sign Abdukodir Khusanov

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's wife Cristina wanted him to prioritise two jobs prior to 'split'
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has reportedly split from his wife after 30 years together, with the couple having been based in two different countries for several years

arts.ttl: Manchester City making moves for left-back – ‘Expression of interest’ could become concrete offer
arts.sum: Manchester City are making moves to sign Andrea Cambiaso from Juventus, but face resistance from the Italian giants. That’s according to Gazzetta dello Sport, who report that Manchester City have targeted the Juventus man as part of their January transfer window drive. Juventus, though, have made it clear that Cambiaso is ‘absolutely not for sale’. The post Manchester City making moves for left-back – ‘Expression of interest’ could become concrete offer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Manchester City agree deal in principle for Palmeiras teenager Vitor Reis
arts.sum: City are also looking to bring in Lens defender Abdukodir Khusanov and have been linked with Eintracht Frankfurt striker Omar Marmoush.

arts.ttl: Manchester City agree deal to buy defender Vitor Reis from Palmeiras
arts.sum: Brazilian teenager set to join for about £30m City also working to buy Khusanov from Lens Manchester City are closing in on the signing of the Palmeiras centre-back Vitor Reis with an agreement in principle understood to have been reached. The 19-year-old Brazilian looks set to join the Premier League champions for about £30m. City are working to bring in another central defender in Lens’s Uzbekistan international Abdukodir Khusanov after a considerable slump in results. They won only once in 13 games as 2024 drew to a close and lie sixth in the league table before Tuesday’s trip to Brentford. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker future: "Nuclear button has been pressed" - but will Man City sign replacement in January after Pep Guardiola "death knell"?
arts.sum: Manchester City expert Steven McInerney speaks to Sports Mole about Kyle Walker's future and discusses whether the Citizens will look to sign a replacement right-back in January.
